title: Felt Furniture Pads 60 Pcs, Floor Protector for Chair Leg, Self-Adhesive Pads for Furniture Feet, Anti-Scratches and Reduce Noise, Protect Your Hard Wood Floor
features: 60PACKS FELT PADS SET --- INCLUDE 20 SMALL ROUND(∅20mm), 16 LARGER ROUND(∅28mm), 24 SQUARE(25mm).
ANTI-SLIP FURNITURE PADS --- Made of high density felt material with strong adhesive backing, stay firmly and not fall off easily.
NO MORE FLOOR SCRATCHES --- 3mm thickness provides good resilience, these furniture pads are soft and protect hardwood floors from scratches.
NO MORE NOISE - This felt pad can effectively absorb the noise caused by the friction of tables and chairs, creating a quiet environment for the family.
EASY TO USE --- Please clean the furniture leg before sticking and after sticking, press it and leave for few hours, 100% AMOUNT RETURN OR REPLACEMENT SERVICE FOR ANY QUALITY ISSUE.
